user.title: Configure Solar Irrigation
user.description: Configure solar inputs, irrigation output, rain handling, pulse-and-soak delivery, and the automatic watering window.

init.title: Update Solar Irrigation options
init.description: Configure source entities, water-demand calibration, rain handling, and the automatic watering window.

error.invalid_entity: The selected entity does not exist.
error.not_numeric: The selected sensor does not have a numeric state.
error.invalid_unit: The selected sensor uses an unsupported unit.
error.invalid_value: The value must be finite and within the supported range.
error.invalid_watering_window: The watering window start and end times must be different.
error.invalid_irrigation_entity: Select an existing switch or valve entity.
error.unsupported_irrigation_entity: The selected irrigation entity does not provide the required start and stop services.
error.already_configured: This irrigation entity is already used by another Solar Irrigation entry.

abort.already_configured: This irrigation entity is already configured.

init.title: Update Solar Irrigation options
init.description: Configure solar inputs, irrigation output, rain handling, pulse-and-soak delivery, and the automatic watering window.

error.invalid_entity: The selected entity does not exist.
error.not_numeric: The selected sensor does not have a numeric state.
error.invalid_unit: The selected sensor uses an unsupported unit.
error.invalid_value: The value must be finite and within the supported range.
error.invalid_watering_window: The watering window start and end times must be different.
error.invalid_irrigation_entity: Select an existing switch or valve entity.
error.unsupported_irrigation_entity: The selected irrigation entity does not provide the required start and stop services.
error.already_configured: This irrigation entity is already used by another Solar Irrigation entry.

run_now.name: Run irrigation now
run_now.description: Start a manual pulse-and-soak watering event. The confirmed pump-on time is added to today's delivered total.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Optional total pump-on time in minutes. The time is divided into configured pulses.

ignore_rain.name: Ignore rain
ignore_rain.description: Ignore rain blocking and rain reduction for this manual event.

stop.name: Stop irrigation
stop.description: Stop the active watering or soak cycle.

entry_not_found.message: Solar Irrigation configuration entry {entry_id} was not found.

entry_not_loaded.message: Solar Irrigation configuration entry {entry_id} is not loaded.

source_data_unavailable.message: Solar or rain source data is unavailable. Refresh the source entities or use an explicit duration with Ignore rain enabled.
